content: Just as the linguistic sense of reflexion as a learning practice (taught in high English writing workshops requires learners to stop, review their own written output to revise meaning, the original Reflexion autonomous AI agent framework can be extended to integrate a multi-perspective self-reflection LLM mechanism that borrows the structured reflective writing pedagogy from language learning to reduce inconsistent reasoning errors. This structured reflective prompt template adapted from EFL writing reflection exercises guides LLMs to explicitly surface conflicting solution perspectives, similar to how student writers refine their arguments by reflecting on feedback on their own drafts.
